failures: No structured {type, severity, category, scope, summary} format — used prose + table instead
No audit report format — no frontmatter, no verdict field, no convergence tracking, no round records

regression_check.details: All 8 modified Skills verified: audit.enabled=false guard present, existing workflow unmodified, output format additive-only. See regression-check.md.

analysis.unique_value: audit-engine's primary value is PROCESS structure: multi-round convergence tracking, structured conclusion format, verdict calculation, and audit report generation. Vanilla Claude identifies the same issues but cannot produce the structured audit workflow.
analysis.content_parity: Both with_skill and without_skill correctly identify Critical security gaps. Content quality is comparable.
analysis.process_advantage: with_skill produces: frontmatter metadata, round-by-round records, four-tuple convergence proof, PASS/FAIL verdict calculation, agent attribution. None of these appear in without_skill output.
